leaf.title: Include temperature domain in list-units grouping
leaf.content:
The confirmed wave finding: list-units builds its grouping from the factor-based domain table only, so the affine temperature domain never appears.

Files: unitconv/cli/list_units.py, tests/test_list_units.py

Acceptance criteria:
- `unitconv list-units` output includes a 'temperature' group listing C, F, K
- factor-based groups unchanged

Test expectations: extend tests/test_list_units.py with a temperature-group assertion
